candidates.name: pp3_midfreq_residual_strata_4bet
candidates.thesis: Use coarse PP3 residual strata plus MidFreq stability to fill the orthogonal slot without copying fourier residual ranking.
candidates.selection_rule: PP3 base bets1-3 + new orthogonal bet4 from residual score map

candidates.name: pp3_midfreq_residual_strata_3bet
candidates.thesis: Use coarse PP3 residual strata plus MidFreq stability to fill the orthogonal slot without copying fourier residual ranking.
candidates.selection_rule: Keep the two strongest PP3 core tickets under the new score map, then force-include the new orthogonal ticket as bet3

candidates.name: pp3_midfreq_stability_phase_4bet
candidates.thesis: Reward numbers that stay mid-frequency across short/long windows, then use phase divergence only as an orthogonal tie-breaker.
candidates.selection_rule: PP3 base bets1-3 + new orthogonal bet4 from residual score map

candidates.name: pp3_midfreq_stability_phase_3bet
candidates.thesis: Reward numbers that stay mid-frequency across short/long windows, then use phase divergence only as an orthogonal tie-breaker.
candidates.selection_rule: Keep the two strongest PP3 core tickets under the new score map, then force-include the new orthogonal ticket as bet3

candidates.name: pp3_midfreq_consistency_guard_4bet
candidates.thesis: Penalize cross-window rank drift first, then keep only enough PP3 residual context to avoid collapsing back into the old Fourier order.
candidates.selection_rule: PP3 base bets1-3 + new orthogonal bet4 from residual score map

candidates.name: pp3_midfreq_consistency_guard_3bet
candidates.thesis: Penalize cross-window rank drift first, then keep only enough PP3 residual context to avoid collapsing back into the old Fourier order.
candidates.selection_rule: Keep the two strongest PP3 core tickets under the new score map, then force-include the new orthogonal ticket as bet3

best_candidate.selection_rule: PP3 base bets1-3 + new orthogonal bet4 from residual score map

# POWER_LOTTO PP3 + MidFreq orthogonal V2 validation (2026-04-23)

- Family verdict: **WATCH**
- Best candidate: `pp3_midfreq_residual_strata_4bet` (4bet, **WATCH**)
- Best 150/500/1500 Edge: +2.06% / +2.80% / +2.60%
- Best 150/500/1500 perm p: 0.5224 / 0.1741 / 0.0448
- Best 150/500/1500 Cohen's d: -0.002 / 1.002 / 1.770
- Best per-bet efficiency: 71.4% / 73.1% / 65.4%
- Leakage check: PASS
- Failure-aware scope note: this round does **not** rerun Winning Quality P2-1, special V3/V4 reorder, or midfreq regime-gate tweaks because those families are already documented as blocked / rejected in trusted wiki + lessons; V2 only tests a new PP3+MidFreq orthogonal feature family.
- No candidate cleared all gates; McNemar not triggered.
